name: Defect handling — артикул дефектен → write-off
expected_result: Запис в write_offs / inventory_events с reason='defect'
AI insight може да създаде сигнал ако дефекти > threshold
smoke_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM stock_movements WHERE movement_type = 'write_off' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
